AppDescription: gistsync is a provider-agnostic file sync engine using GitHub Gists
AppLongDescription: A fast and efficient CLI tool to sync local files and folders to GitHub Gists with 2-way hash-based change detection.
ConfigMissingError: configuration or state is missing or malformed. Please run 'gistsync init' to set up the tool
NoProvidersConnected: No providers are connected. Please set up a provider first.
RepairDetailsHint: Use 'gistsync config repair' to see details.
NoBackupFound: No backup found in the selected provider. Continuing with normal initialization.
DefaultProviderUsage:
The default provider is used for:
 - Fast sync: used when no provider is specified in commands.
 - Backup: your configuration and state will be backed up to this provider.
InvalidConfigReset: Some invalid configuration values were reset to defaults.
NoMappingsFound: No mappings found to sync. Use 'gistsync sync <path>' to start tracking files.
WatcherStarted: GistSync Watcher started. Watching for changes... (Polling remote every 60s)
GistDeleteWarning: Warning: failed to delete old gist {{.ID}}: {{.Err}}
InvalidInput: ❌ Invalid input: {{.Err}}. Please try again or press ENTER for default.
ReadyWithHint: gistsync is ready! Use 'gistsync sync <path>' to start syncing.
NoOtherProcessesRunning: No other gistsync processes were running.
GitHubInfo:
GitHub
   1. Install GitHub CLI: https://cli.github.com/
   2. Authenticate: run 'gh auth login'
   3. Verify: run 'gistsync provider github test'
GitLabInfo:
GitLab
   (Implementation pending. Support for GitLab personal access tokens coming soon.)
   3. Verify: run 'gistsync provider gitlab test'
InitialSyncStart: Path {{.Path}} is not tracked. Performing initial sync...
PrivateConversionNote: Note: Converting Public to Private requires recreating the gist. The Gist ID will change.
RecoverNoHistory:
No sync history found in logs.
Note: Reconstruction is only possible for syncs performed after the logging system was implemented.
RecoverUpToDate: State is already up to date (no new log entries since last checkpoint).
RecoverInterrupted: Detected interrupted local commit for {{.Path}} (Remote succeeded, local state may have missed it)
RecoverAllExist: All sync events since last checkpoint already exist in state.json.
RecoverNewMappings: Successfully recovered {{.Count}} new mappings to state.json
RecoverUpdated: Successfully updated existing mappings in state.json
RecoverLogOpenFailed: Failed to open log file {{.File}}: skipping
UnknownConfigKeyHint: Unknown config key '{{.Key}}'. Valid keys: watch_interval_seconds, watch_debounce_ms, log_level
InvalidPositiveInt: '{{.Key}}' must be a positive integer, got '{{.Val}}'
InvalidLogLevel: Invalid log level '{{.Val}}'. Choose from: info, debug, warn, error
RemoveNotTrackedHint: Path '{{.Path}}' is not being tracked. Use 'gistsync status' to see tracked paths.
PathNotTrackedHint: Path '{{.Path}}' is not tracked. Use 'gistsync sync {{.Path}}' to start tracking it.
RemoteGistEmpty: Remote gist {{.ID}} is empty. It may have been deleted on the provider.
SyncAllSummary: Sync complete: {{.Success}} succeeded, {{.Failed}} failed out of {{.Total}} mappings.
AbsPathFailed: Failed to resolve absolute path for '{{.Path}}': {{.Err}}
MappingOverwriteConfirm:
⚠️  Path {{.Path}} is already tracked with {{.OldID}}.
   Do you want to overwrite mapping to {{.NewID}}?
